3123780.name: UNDER DEATH
3123780.description:
An explosive fusion of press-your-luck adrenaline, rogue-lite depth, and survivor-style chaos.

In UnderDeath, every run is a high-stakes climb through escalating danger. You’ll fight, build, and adapt as you chase score thresholds that unlock powerful upgrades, new characters, and brutal boss encounters. But the further you go, the more you risk losing everything.

Will you play it safe and bank your progress—or press your luck for even greater rewards?

🎲 Risk vs. Reward, Run After Run
Score milestones unlock permanent content—but only if you survive. Every run is a strategic gamble: stop now and keep your gains, or push forward and risk it all for more.

🧪 Build Crafting That Matters
Experiment with weapons, power-ups, and modifiers to create powerful synergies. No two runs are the same, and the right combo can turn the tide.

⚔️ Bosses That Test Your Limits
Unlock and face off against screen-filling bosses that demand precision, planning, and a build that can go the distance.

🌀 Survivor-Style Chaos
Enemies swarm, patterns evolve, and the pressure never lets up. Stay mobile, stay sharp, and stay alive.

🔁 Endless Replayability
Procedurally generated runs, evolving challenges, and a deep progression system keep you coming back for “just one more run.”
3123780.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 韩语, 日语, 俄语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
